prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约5321→3701→3485→4102，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），2023–2024年连续两年走强后2025年有所后移，2025 年基准约4102名；该校在四川省物理类招生计划2022年105人、2023年110人、2024年110人、2025年111人，2026年计划121人，较2025年扩招约9%，扩招 对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（2025年第12名），稳居全国Top20，综合实力突出；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端等舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第29位（较热），短视频曝光量较高；历史投档异常方面，2022年多省出现断档（中关注），20 23–2025年关注度有所下降；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共23个，其中工商管理、生态学为A+，中国语言文学、数学、物理学、生物学、药学等为A，临床医学、计 算机科学与技术、法学等为A-，学科实力雄厚，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关理工医类专业整体热度平稳偏热；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万人，较20 25年（约46.3万人）增加约15.6%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区顶尖高校， 对西南地区考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在四川省招生规模较大（物理类超百人），本地无同层次高校直接竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4102名、2026年扩招约9% 的缓解效应、四川省考生总数大幅增长约15.6%带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面但学科实力强劲等因素，扩招与考生增长相互对冲后竞争略趋激烈；预测2026年物理类最低录取 位次约4294名，区间3993–4595名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 5321 → 3701 → 3485 → 4102, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). After two consecutive years of strength in 2023–2024, it slightly declined in 2025, with a baseline of about 4102 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan Province Physics Category was 105 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 110 in 2024, 111 in 2025, and 121 in 2026, an increase of about 9% compared to 2025, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (12th in 2025), consistently in the national Top 20, with outstanding comprehensive strength. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents such as academic misconduct. Its Douyin popularity ranks 29th overall (relatively hot), with high short video exposure. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022 (medium attention), with attention decreasing from 2023 to 2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration and Ecology as A+, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Pharmacy, etc. as A, and Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Law, etc. as A-, indicating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall popularity of related science, engineering, and medical majors is stable to slightly hot. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), leading to a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China, with strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the Southwest region. Its enrollment scale in Sichuan Province is large (over 100 in Physics Category), with no direct competition from universities of the same level locally.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4102, the mitigating effect of about 9% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 15.6% in the total number of Sichuan candidates, the slightly negative university reputation but strong disciplinary strength, and the mutual offset of enrollment expansion and candidate growth leading to slightly more intense competition, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 4294, with a range of 3993–4595.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3993–4595, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<3993), focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program. For rankings near the upper limit (>4595), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
